events.title: Multi Chamber After Hours Event - Bay Pointe Lakefront Pavilion
events.description: Enter your email address below to receive a reminder message.

location.name: About Bay Pointe Bay Pointe Inn is a family-owned, award-winning full-service resort nestled along the south shore of Gun Lake. Offering state-of-the-art meeting facilities, flexible event spaces, and relaxing outdoor settings, Bay Pointe creates a unique experience for everything from executive retreats to social celebrations. With five versatile venues, including lakefront spaces and a wooded ballroom accommodating up to 300 guests, the property is designed to host groups of all sizes. Guests can enjoy boutique-style hotel rooms, spacious two-bedroom cottages, and unique larger accommodations like the BoatHouse Villa overlooking the lake. An experienced hospitality team specializes in seamless planning and execution for meetings, retreats, weddings, and events from 10 to 300 guests. The onsite Bay Pointe Bar & Grille features stunning lake views, handcrafted cocktails, and seasonal cuisine year-round. Bay Pointe also proudly offers offsite catering services within a 25-mile radius, bringing the same exceptional food and hospitality directly to your venue or event location. Bay Pointe is truly one of Michigan’s most distinctive resort destinations. About the Lakefront Pavilion: A perfect setting for a unique waterfront open-air meeting space, luncheon, group outing, group cookout, etc. available for groups up to 200 May-October. Located literally just steps away from the lake, this space features glorious lawn and gardens, serene waterfall with koi pond, outdoor patio with gas fire pit and torches, ceiling fans, clear roll-down sides and amazing panoramic views of Gun Lake. Additional information can be viewed at www.baypointeinn.com 11456 Marsh Road Shelbyville MI 49344
